description: Set node configuration for building final response in Family Insurance Analysis Workflow. This node creates a structured JSON response with success status, message, timestamp, and HTML file metadata from the binary file generated by the Convert to File node.

workflowContext.purpose: Final response builder that structures the output data for webhook response and Make.com integration

fieldDescriptions.success: Boolean flag indicating successful processing of family profiles
fieldDescriptions.message: Hebrew success message for user feedback
fieldDescriptions.timestamp: ISO timestamp of when the processing was completed
fieldDescriptions.htmlFile: Object containing metadata about the generated HTML file (fileName, mimeType, size) or null if no file was generated

n8nExpressions.timestamp: Uses n8n expression to generate current ISO timestamp
n8nExpressions.htmlFile: Uses n8n expression to conditionally extract file metadata from binary data or return null
